news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences promoter Ashish S. Dandekar disclosed a pledge of 6.5L shares (0.34% of capital).
The pledge, dated March 30, 2026, was made to Ashika Credit Capital for additional margin security.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences promoter Ashish S. Dandekar disclosed a pledge of 6.5L shares (0.34% of capital).
The pledge, dated March 30, 2026, was made to Ashika Credit Capital for additional margin security.

news.title:
Promoter Ashish S. Dandekar disclosed pledging of Camlin Fine Sciences shares for margin cover.
Encumbrance covers 74.1% of promoter's holdings, benefiting financial assistance and acquisitions.
news.summary:
Promoter Ashish S. Dandekar disclosed pledging of Camlin Fine Sciences shares for margin cover.
Encumbrance covers 74.1% of promoter's holdings, benefiting financial assistance and acquisitions.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences announces judicial liquidation of subsidiary CFS Europe S.p.A.
Court in Italy initiated liquidation; updates to follow on material developments.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences announces judicial liquidation of subsidiary CFS Europe S.p.A.
Court in Italy initiated liquidation; updates to follow on material developments.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquires 78.68% stake in Vinpai at €3.60/share.
The acquisition includes 84.89% of Vinpai's voting rights, completed by Nov 2025.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquires 78.68% stake in Vinpai at €3.60/share.
The acquisition includes 84.89% of Vinpai's voting rights, completed by Nov 2025.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences received an order from CGST & Central Excise demanding Rs.23.5 Cr for ineligible ITC, penalties, and interest.
The company stated no material financial impact and plans to file an appeal against the order.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences received an order from CGST & Central Excise demanding Rs.23.5 Cr for ineligible ITC, penalties, and interest.
The company stated no material financial impact and plans to file an appeal against the order.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences promoter Ashish Dandekar pledged 18 lakh shares on 24 Feb 2026 to HDFC Bank, raising encumbered shares to 4.58% of equity.
The company reported a Rs 36.2 crore loss in Q3 Dec 2025 against Rs 4.1 crore loss YoY; shares surged 6.7% to Rs 148.5 on 27 Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences promoter Ashish Dandekar pledged 18 lakh shares on 24 Feb 2026 to HDFC Bank, raising encumbered shares to 4.58% of equity.
The company reported a Rs 36.2 crore loss in Q3 Dec 2025 against Rs 4.1 crore loss YoY; shares surged 6.7% to Rs 148.5 on 27 Feb 2026.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquires full ownership of a chemical firm.
The acquisition aims to expand its product range and market presence.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquires full ownership of a chemical firm.
The acquisition aims to expand its product range and market presence.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences reported 6.1% YoY revenue growth to Rs. 4,572 Mn in Q3 FY26.
EBITDA margin at 6.7% was impacted by pricing pressure and acquisition costs.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences reported 6.1% YoY revenue growth to Rs. 4,572 Mn in Q3 FY26.
EBITDA margin at 6.7% was impacted by pricing pressure and acquisition costs.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences' board approved unaudited Q3 and nine-month results ending Dec 31, 2025.
Fire at subsidiary's blending unit on Feb 7, 2026; financial impact undetermined.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences' board approved unaudited Q3 and nine-month results ending Dec 31, 2025.
Fire at subsidiary's blending unit on Feb 7, 2026; financial impact undetermined.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences reports a fire at its Brazil blend plant on Feb 7, 2026.
Operations suspended; fire under control; insurance covers potential losses.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences reports a fire at its Brazil blend plant on Feb 7, 2026.
Operations suspended; fire under control; insurance covers potential losses.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences Ltd to hold Q3 FY26 earnings call on 13 Feb 2026 at 5 PM IST.
Senior management will discuss financial performance using only public information; no UPSI will be shared.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences Ltd to hold Q3 FY26 earnings call on 13 Feb 2026 at 5 PM IST.
Senior management will discuss financial performance using only public information; no UPSI will be shared.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences' tax demand of ₹333.2 cr was quashed by High Court.
Tax department appealed in Supreme Court; company updating stakeholders.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences' tax demand of ₹333.2 cr was quashed by High Court.
Tax department appealed in Supreme Court; company updating stakeholders.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences Ltd surged 8.7% on 22 Jan 2026, reaching Rs 145.8.
The stock outperformed the Specialty Chemicals sector and market benchmarks after a 2-day decline.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences Ltd surged 8.7% on 22 Jan 2026, reaching Rs 145.8.
The stock outperformed the Specialty Chemicals sector and market benchmarks after a 2-day decline.

news.title:
CFS Europe S.p.A., a subsidiary of Camlin Fine Sciences, filed for liquidation due to weak demand and high energy costs.
The appeal was submitted to the Tribunal of Ravenna citing inability to pay debts or make recovery investments.
news.summary:
CFS Europe S.p.A., a subsidiary of Camlin Fine Sciences, filed for liquidation due to weak demand and high energy costs.
The appeal was submitted to the Tribunal of Ravenna citing inability to pay debts or make recovery investments.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquired 11,00,000 Vinpai shares via bond conversion, raising its stake to 83.82%.
Vinpai, a French ingredient tech firm, specializes in algae-based solutions; its FY24 turnover was €9.2M.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquired 11,00,000 Vinpai shares via bond conversion, raising its stake to 83.82%.
Vinpai, a French ingredient tech firm, specializes in algae-based solutions; its FY24 turnover was €9.2M.

news.title:
India Ratings downgraded Camlin Fine Sciences Ltd's long-term rating to IND BBB- Stable and short-term rating to IND A3 due to weak FY26 performance and high working capital needs.
CFSL's vanillin business faces pricing headwinds from US tariffs, but blends business shows profitability. FY27 EBITDA improvement expected to aid debt repayments.
news.summary:
India Ratings downgraded Camlin Fine Sciences Ltd's long-term rating to IND BBB- Stable and short-term rating to IND A3 due to weak FY26 performance and high working capital needs.
CFSL's vanillin business faces pricing headwinds from US tariffs, but blends business shows profitability. FY27 EBITDA improvement expected to aid debt repayments.

news.title:
InCred Equities reiterates Add call on Camlin Fine Sciences, citing benefits from tight vanillin markets in US and Europe.
CFSL's blend portfolio and Vinpai acquisition expected to boost margins, create entry barriers, and unlock revenue potential.
news.summary:
InCred Equities reiterates Add call on Camlin Fine Sciences, citing benefits from tight vanillin markets in US and Europe.
CFSL's blend portfolio and Vinpai acquisition expected to boost margins, create entry barriers, and unlock revenue potential.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquires 78.7% in French firm Vinpai, plans tender offer for remaining shares at €3.6 each.
Regulatory delays in India postpone offer filing to Feb 2026; stake rises to 83.8% post bond conversion.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquires 78.7% in French firm Vinpai, plans tender offer for remaining shares at €3.6 each.
Regulatory delays in India postpone offer filing to Feb 2026; stake rises to 83.8% post bond conversion.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences surged 7.1%, hitting an intraday high of Rs 157.05.
The stock outperformed Sensex, which rose 0.5% on 12 Dec 2025.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences surged 7.1%, hitting an intraday high of Rs 157.05.
The stock outperformed Sensex, which rose 0.5% on 12 Dec 2025.

news.title:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquires majority stake in Vinpai at INR 247.7/share.
Indian regulatory approval delayed to Nov 18, block acquisition by Nov 30.
news.summary:
Camlin Fine Sciences acquires majority stake in Vinpai at INR 247.7/share.
Indian regulatory approval delayed to Nov 18, block acquisition by Nov 30.
